commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Kimi Code OAuth credential discovery/refresh, Kimi local token-cost scanning from Kimi Code and Pi sessions, source/tier UI labels, settings toggles, CLI/docs updates, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature request, but the review findings are source-reproducible: the resolver fallback and credential rewrite paths are visible on the PR head. I did not run live provider probes because AGENTS.md forbids unrequested real-account validation.
